def aggregate_scores(records, weights):
    totals = {}
    for record in records:
        category = record["category"]
        score = record["score"]
        weight = weights.get(record["category"], 1.0)
        adjusted = score * weight
        totals[category] = totals.get(category, 0) + adjusted
    return totals


def build_index(items, metadata):
    index = {}
    for item in items:
        key = item["id"]
        prefix = metadata.get(item["id"], "default")
        index[key] = f"{prefix}:{item['value']}"
    return index
